title: Organizational Learning Record
description: One append-only JSONL line of shared organizational memory (aligned with the repo's existing docs/governance/KNOWLEDGE-MEMORY.jsonl convention, DNA-GOV-007). Learning belongs to BOTH governors. Every record is evidence-cited; a learning with no evidence is not recorded.

evidence.description: Evidence-bundle ids, artifact hashes, run ids, or file paths. A record with no evidence is rejected (Evidence before Assumption).

supersedes.description: record_id this revises. New evidence supersedes; it never edits history.

hypothesis_state.description: Only for type=hypothesis. Moves on evidence, never on preference.
